title: Make the PERFECT Videos with Claude Code (Full Workflow)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a fully automated video production workflow where Claude Code orchestrates planning, code generation, voiceover, visuals, music, and editing end-to-end from a URL or idea. The system uses Archon as a harness builder and HyperFrames as the AI video generation framework to produce publication-ready videos without human creators in the pipeline.
